lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. It has significant cosmetic damage to the exterior and interior. Multiple mechanical systems require immediate repair or replacement to be fully operational.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or cosmetic blemishes. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained as a collector-grade example. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like shine with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is immaculate, with the leather and trim showing no signs of wear, looking and smelling as it did when it first left the factory. Mechanically, the car is perfect, featuring a complete service history and performing flawlessly in every aspect. All original features and electronic components are fully functional. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in truly mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows typical signs of wear for its age, including several minor scratches, a few small door dings, and some fading on the roof's clear coat. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows clear evidence of use, with some wear on the driver's seat bolster and minor staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives well, though the service history suggests that upcoming maintenance, such as new tires and a brake service, will be needed soon. All essential features, including the heater and radio, are in working order. This is a dependable choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections.
Get ready to hit the road in a dependable vehicle that’s ready for its next chapter! This car is a solid choice for anyone looking for a functional daily driver

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard and offering exceptional mechanical integrity. This model represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and reliable performance. Meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for quality, it stands as a testament to engineering excellence and remains in commendable condition for its next owner.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s honestly in wonderful shape. It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it for all your adventures! It's been kept clean and looked after properly, so it's totally ready to hit the road with its next owner. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precision-shifted Getrag 6-speed manual. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and structural subframe reinforcement to mitigate common chassis fatigue. The variable M differential lock ensures optimal traction during high-G cornering, while the suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings. Minor cosmetic patina exists, but the powertrain and drivetrain integrity are paramount, making this a driver’s specimen ready for the apex.
Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Maintenance current.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and serves as a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, age-appropriate blemishes that do not detract from its overall sharp appearance. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with plush, intact seating and a dashboard free of cracks. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has a complete service history, with recent fluid flushes and a new set of all-season tires. The engine idles smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through every gear. It provides a quiet, comfortable ride that inspires confidence on long highway stretches and city commutes alike. This is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Offering a harmonious balance of proven performance and long-term reliability, it has been preserved to an exacting standard, ensuring a premium on-road experience. With a comprehensive service history and an aesthetic that commands presence, this offering provides exceptional value for those who demand excellence and mechanical integrity.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking dependable luxury at a strategic price point.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of over the years. It's perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with double-VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This chassis delivers exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback through its tuned MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual and a 3.62 limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes VANOS servicing and subframe inspection, ensuring the structural rigidity and high-RPM reliability expected of this platform. A driver-focused example that balances raw performance with daily usability.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth. No leaks.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic wear, while the interior remains a smoke-free sanctuary featuring well-preserved leather upholstery and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, a fresh oil service, and a brake system refresh. With a quiet cabin, precise handling, and tires that show significant tread life remaining, this car offers a smooth and reliable driving experience. Complete service records are available to demonstrate its history of consistent care.

This expertly maintained vehicle offers a refined balance of performance and lasting value. Having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A sophisticated choice for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition in its class.

Offering a refined driving experience and reliable longevity, this selection represents an exceptional value proposition for the sophisticated buyer who prioritizes both quality and fiscal prudence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been absolutely wonderful to me. It's in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, so it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Up for sale is a mechanically sound 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2), featuring the high-revving 3.6L M96 flat-six engine with Variocam Plus. This example delivers a linear power band and has had the critical IMS bearing retrofit completed with a ceramic dual-row upgrade for peace of mind. The 6-speed Getrag manual transaxle provides crisp engagement, while the factory-tuned suspension utilizes a multi-link rear setup and McPherson struts for precise turn-in. Equipped with four-piston Brembo monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors, the braking system offers excellent thermal management. The chassis remains rigid, and the hydraulic steering rack provides the communicative feedback enthusiasts crave. Recent service includes a full fluid flush and fitment of N-rated performance tires, making this a turn-key driver's car.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, stylish daily driver. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic blemishes, while the interior is clean, smoke-free, and features well-preserved upholstery. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. This car offers a balanced combination of performance and comfort, making it an excellent value for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver.
